greeting.text: Hungry, are you? Bring me good ingredients and I'll cook you a proper meal.

cook.text: Bread, meat, fruit, wild herbs, glowcap mushrooms — bring them here and type COOK, and I'll turn them into hearty fare.

why.text: A hearty stew before a hard fight steadies the hands and stiffens the guard. Cook a meal before you go, and you'll thank me.

end.text: Off you go, then. Come back when you're peckish.
